mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, service_model_key, `name`, url, app_key, model_key, de_service_model_id, model_version
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_re_service_model (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, service_model_key, `name`, url, app_key, model_key, de_service_model_id, model_version) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{serviceModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deServiceModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_wf_re_service_model
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
`status`,
flags,
service_model_key,
`name`,
url,
app_key,
model_key,
de_service_model_id,
model_version,
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{serviceModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deServiceModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_wf_re_service_model
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
service_model_key = #{serviceModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_key = #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
de_service_model_id = #{deServiceModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
model_version = #{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_wf_re_service_model set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, service_model_key = #{serviceModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_key = #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, de_service_model_id = #{deServiceModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, model_version = #{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_re_service_model (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, service_model_key, `name`, url, app_key, model_key, de_service_model_id, model_version) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.serviceModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deServiceModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.select:
select a.* from t_wf_re_service_model a inner join ( select max(id) id from t_wf_re_service_model
app_key=#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and `status` = 0
group by service_model_key )b on a.id = b.id
